nasb.text: Now, brethren, we wish to make known to you the grace of God which has been given in the churches of Macedonia,

esv.text: We want you to know, brothers, about the grace of God that has been given among the churches of Macedonia,

cnv.text: 弟兄們，我現在把　神賜給馬其頓眾教會的恩典告訴你們：

ccb.text: 弟兄姊妹，我们现在要让你们知道上帝向马其顿各教会所施的恩典。

csbs.text: 弟兄们，我们要你们明白神在马其顿省各教会中所赐的恩典：
